utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: The format requires each coverage item to include both the type and costs; specifically: health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with costs — plan lists 'SecureLife Basic Plan (Physical & Mental Health)' and a monthly cost; this satisfies physical and mental health and costs. property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs — plan lists 'PrimeHome Premium + Home Office Protection' and a monthly cost; sufficient. travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs — plan lists 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' and a monthly cost; sufficient. additional_services: any enhancement services with costs — plan lists 'None' with €0/month; acceptable. total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown — plan only provides '€315/month' and does not include an annual breakdown, so it is not fully specified per 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three items with specific plan names: SecureLife Basic Plan (Physical & Mental Health) for health coverage, PrimeHome Premium + Home Office Protection for property coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel coverage. From the ground-truth ratings: SecureLife Basic Plan appears in both physical health (rating 4) and mental health (rating 8). Since the plan name explicitly says Physical & Mental Health, we include both corresponding ratings. For property, 'PrimeHome Premium + Home Office Protection' is a combination; the base property plan closest in name is 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' (rating 3) and the add-on 'Home Office Protection' is listed under property enhancement services with rating 7, so we map both. For travel, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' directly matches the travel insurance option with rating 3.
